final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing museum infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume, in the style of National Museum exhibition panels.

Style/medium: museum-grade infographic, archival illustration style, National Museum exhibition panel aesthetic, restrained academic elegance, flat vector illustration with photorealistic texture integration, parchment paper texture background

Composition: vertical infographic layout with fixed grid structure — top header banner, left structural breakdown zone with callout lines, upper-right material/texture zone, middle-right pattern/color symbolism zone, bottom wearing sequence flowchart, central full-body figure or object as main subject

Subject: Yi ethnic minority traditional costume (凉山彝族服饰) — full ensemble including embroidered headpiece, pleated skirt, silver ornaments, cross-stitch vest, and embroidered shoes

Scene/backdrop: warm off-white archival paper texture (rice paper / silk paper / light tea tone), subtle aged paper grain, no distracting background elements, generous white space for academic readability

Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰" "彝族传统服饰" "结构拆解" "材质工艺" "纹样寓意" "色彩含义" "穿着顺序"

Color palette: earth-tone foundation (warm beige, parchment white, light tea) as base; Yi costume primary colors — indigo blue, scarlet red, bright yellow embroidery accents; silver/grey for metal ornaments; black for text and structural lines

Materials/textures: hand-woven wool texture, indigo-dyed cotton, silver filigree metalwork, cross-stitch embroidery detail, wax-resist batik patterns, leather trim

Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese characters only, no pinyin or English; layout must follow fixed five-zone structure; maintain museum-grade legibility and professional restraint; figure must be anatomically correct and culturally authentic

Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography style, e-commerce product page look, anime illustration, cosplay aesthetic, cluttered labeling, incorrect structural diagrams, blurry text, fake material textures, excessive decorative elements, gradients without purpose
